summary: Add CI job that fails if schema/corpus-schema.sql hash diverges from the copy in guru-web (fetch-and-compare on every push)

resolution.note: .github/workflows/schema-drift.yml added. Parametrized on GURU_WEB_REPO repository variable so the URL isn't hardcoded. On drift: fails the build, prints both sha256s + diff, and references v2 §7.1 for the two-repo update procedure. Authenticated with default GITHUB_TOKEN so private guru-web repos work. User will need to set GURU_WEB_REPO under Settings → Variables → Actions before the first push.
